title: SsmDeploy executor
description: Deploy an API image to EC2 instances by running an SSM document.

region.description: AWS region where SSM command should run

documentName.description: SSM document name. Defaults to AWS-RunShellScript.

instanceIds.description: Target EC2 instance ids. Falls back to API_SSM_INSTANCE_IDS (comma-separated) when omitted. Legacy SERVER_SSM_INSTANCE_IDS is also supported.

imageRef.description: Container image reference to deploy. Falls back to API_IMAGE_REF when omitted. Legacy SERVER_IMAGE_REF is also supported.

commands.description: Explicit shell commands. When omitted, Docker deploy commands are generated.

containerName.description: Container name used by generated deploy commands

hostPort.description: Host port used by generated deploy commands

containerPort.description: Container port used by generated deploy commands

additionalRunArgs.description: Additional Docker run arguments used by generated deploy commands

pruneDockerBeforePull.description: Remove the existing container and prune unused Docker images before pulling the new image

pollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval while waiting for command completion
